Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class StatementBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.StatementBuilder
public final class StatementBuilder extends Object
Builder for assertions with a custom failure message. Created via Reality.checkWithMessage("...").
